Self.Wiki: Defines parameters relating to the attachment point that fires projectiles.

part1DummyPolyId.Wiki: The dummy polygon ID to use for this part.

part1OffsetPosX.Wiki: The position offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

part1OffsetPosY.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

part1OffsetPosZ.Wiki: The position offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

part1OffsetAccuracyPosX.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the x-axis for this part.

part1OffsetAccuracyPosY.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the y-axis for this part.

part1OffsetAccuracyPosZ.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the z-axis for this part.

part1OffsetRotX.Wiki: The rotation offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

part1OffsetRotY.Wiki: The rotation offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

part1OffsetRotZ.Wiki: The rotation offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

part1OffsetAccuracyRotX.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the x-axis for this part.

part1OffsetAccuracyRotY.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the y-axis for this part.

part1OffsetAccuracyRotZ.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the z-axis for this part.

part2DummyPolyId.Wiki: The dummy polygon ID to use for this part.

part2OffsetPosX.Wiki: The position offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

part2OffsetPosY.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

part2OffsetPosZ.Wiki: The position offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

part2OffsetAccuracyPosX.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the x-axis for this part.

part2OffsetAccuracyPosY.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the y-axis for this part.

part2OffsetAccuracyPosZ.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the z-axis for this part.

part2OffsetRotX.Wiki: The rotation offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

part2OffsetRotY.Wiki: The rotation offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

part2OffsetRotZ.Wiki: The rotation offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

part2OffsetAccuracyRotX.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the x-axis for this part.

part2OffsetAccuracyRotY.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the y-axis for this part.

part2OffsetAccuracyRotZ.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the z-axis for this part.

part3DummyPolyId.Wiki: The dummy polygon ID to use for this part.

part3OffsetPosX.Wiki: The position offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

part3OffsetPosY.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

part3OffsetPosZ.Wiki: The position offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

part3OffsetAccuracyPosX.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the x-axis for this part.

part3OffsetAccuracyPosY.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the y-axis for this part.

part3OffsetAccuracyPosZ.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the z-axis for this part.

part3OffsetRotX.Wiki: The rotation offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

part3OffsetRotY.Wiki: The rotation offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

part3OffsetRotZ.Wiki: The rotation offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

part3OffsetAccuracyRotX.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the x-axis for this part.

part3OffsetAccuracyRotY.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the y-axis for this part.

part3OffsetAccuracyRotZ.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the z-axis for this part.

part4DummyPolyId.Wiki: The dummy polygon ID to use for this part.

part4OffsetPosX.Wiki: The position offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

part4OffsetPosY.Wiki: The position offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

part4OffsetPosZ.Wiki: The position offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

part4OffsetAccuracyPosX.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the x-axis for this part.

part4OffsetAccuracyPosY.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the y-axis for this part.

part4OffsetAccuracyPosZ.Wiki: The accuracy of the position offset on the z-axis for this part.

part4OffsetRotX.Wiki: The rotation offset on the x-axis to use for this part.

part4OffsetRotY.Wiki: The rotation offset on the y-axis to use for this part.

part4OffsetRotZ.Wiki: The rotation offset on the z-axis to use for this part.

part4OffsetAccuracyRotX.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the x-axis for this part.

part4OffsetAccuracyRotY.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the y-axis for this part.

part4OffsetAccuracyRotZ.Wiki: The accuracy of the rotation offset on the z-axis for this part.
